trivia_bullets.text: Sonic Assault was released in Guilds of Ravnica (October 5, 2018), an expansion featuring five of Ravnica's ten guilds. It carries the Izzet watermark, placing it within the league of wizards and artificers led by Niv-Mizzet.

Jump-start, this card's keyword, evolved from a vision-design mechanic called 'jewel' that allowed free re-casting from exile. Set Design found that version broken and iterated to the discard-as-cost model. Mark Rosewater called the finished jump-start 'the most Izzet-y guild mechanic to date.'
'He heard stars and saw thunder.' — no named speaker. The inversion of sense-perception mirrors jump-start's own reversal of normal casting sequencing.
No reprints as of 2026; GRN is the sole printing. EDHREC rank 22,226 places it at the fringe of Commander play, consistent with its role as a Limited staple rather than a constructed staple.
